subject: GRB051114: results of the Swift-XRT observation
body:
V. Mangano, G. Cusumano, V. La Parola, T. Mineo
(INAF-IASFPA), D. Burrows, J. Kennea (PSU), L. Cominsky
(Sonoma State U.) and J. Norris (GSFC)
on behalf of the Swift-XRT team:

The Swift-XRT started a 13.6 ks ToO observation of the
field of GRB051114 (Cummings at al., GCN 4272) on
November 15 at 15:18:23 UT, 35 hours after the burst 
trigger.
No new source was detected within the BAT refined error
circle (Sakamoto at al., GCN 4275) down to a limiting flux
of 2.3e-14 ergs/cm/cm/s.
